prompt: The drush sql:query command is failing with a connection error when trying to hit the source database. Can you walk me through checking the database config and figuring out what's wrong?

assertions.name: scans_settings_files
assertions.description: The response scans settings.local.php and/or settings.php for the database key

assertions.name: attempts_connectivity_test
assertions.description: The response attempts a drush sql:query connectivity test and captures the error

assertions.name: reports_failure_with_error
assertions.description: The response clearly reports the connection failure, including the error message

assertions.name: stops_after_failure
assertions.description: The response explicitly stops and does NOT attempt to continue with migration analysis or further queries

assertions.name: uses_drush_not_mysql
assertions.description: The connectivity test uses 'drush sql:query' rather than a direct mysql command
